posts.author: PhotoVoice (Photo Voice)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I’m trying to create an automated workflow where:

Form in Monday enables external people to upload an image file

Zapier is used to send that image file to a Padlet board

I’m able to connect the Monday and Padlet API’s to Zapier successfully, but the image itself isn’t being sent to Padlet due to an authentication error (it expects Monday to be logged in).

Does anybody have any advice about how I might make this work (ideally avoiding additional steps or syncing!)
